# Beeswax Pat - 100% Pure American Beeswax Candles

> Hand-poured 100% organic American beeswax candles made in Severn, Maryland. No paraffin, no soy, no blends, no synthetic fragrance. One ingredient — pure beeswax from American beekeepers.

## About Beeswax Pat
- Business: Father and son small batch candle company
- Location: Severn, Maryland, USA
- Founded: 2025
- Product: "Old Line" — 11 oz pure beeswax candle in prism glass with wood lid
- Price: $28 (single), $50 (2-pack, free shipping), $72 (3-pack, free shipping)
- Wax source: Beelite (American beekeepers, cosmetic-grade purity)
- Contact: beeswaxpat@gmail.com

## Product: Old Line Candle
- Wax: 100% organic American beeswax (single ingredient)
- Size: 11 oz
- Vessel: Heavy iridescent prism glass with wood lid
- Burn time: 40+ hours
- Scent: Natural honey aroma from beeswax (no added fragrance)
- Shipping: USA nationwide, 2-3 business days

## Why Pure Beeswax
- Burns cleaner than paraffin (fewer combustion byproducts)
- Burns longer per ounce (highest melting point of any natural wax: 144-149F)
- No petroleum byproducts, no VOCs like benzene or toluene
- No synthetic fragrance, dyes, or stabilizers
- American-sourced (not imported from China where adulteration is documented)
